slots.notes: The two editorial photos in the About section, both rounded-xl sm:rounded-2xl object-cover. Image 1 is the small frame locked to aspect-[438/346] (~5:4 portrait-ish), shown sm:w-[45%] in the mobile/tablet row and in the desktop left column (self-end). Image 2 is the large frame locked to aspect-[900/600] / aspect-[3/2] (3:2 landscape), shown sm:w-[55%] and in the desktop right column (self-end). Supply two full-bleed studio/work photos cropped to those two fixed ratios; framing must survive object-cover. These are sockets to fill with brand assets, not the placeholder higgs.ai/cloudfront URLs declared in the spec.

The lucide-react ArrowRight glyph (size 14) inside the CTA's white circle, tinted text-[#F26522] (currentColor). Starts at -rotate-45 and rotates to rotate-0 on group-hover with duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1)]. Supply as a currentColor-driven icon so the orange tint and the hover rotation transition still apply; the same button appears in both the mobile and desktop layouts but is one logical icon socket.

mechanic: A single white About section with a numbered badge row over a clamp()-sized two-line heading, splitting into a stacked mobile/tablet layout and a hidden lg:grid grid-cols-[26%_1fr_48%] desktop layout (small image / centered copy + CTA / large image), whose only motion is the orange pill CTA's text-roll on group-hover (a duplicated label inside an overflow-hidden h-[20px] flex-col translating -translate-y-1/2) paired with a white-circle ArrowRight rotating -45deg->0, both at duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1)].
techDelivery: Single React 18 + TypeScript component spec using Tailwind CSS 3.4 (default config, no theme extensions) and lucide-react for the ArrowRight icon; system-default font (no webfont loaded), no state/effects/scroll logic — purely CSS group-hover transitions.
reskinNotes:
The brand orange is baked as inline Tailwind arbitrary classes (bg-[#F26522] hover:bg-[#e05a1a] on the CTA, text-[#F26522] on the arrow) with no :root token, so a recolor is a markup edit and must change the base and hover shades together. All neutrals are default Tailwind utilities (bg-white, text-gray-900, bg-gray-900 + text-white on the numbered circle), again not tokens. All copy is hardcoded in JSX: the '1' badge number, the 'Introducing Axion' pill, the two heading lines, the body paragraph, and the 'About our studio' CTA label. The heading uses a fluid clamp(1.5rem,4vw,3.2rem) with tracking-[-0.02em] leading-[1.12] tuned to the system-font metric, and the copy carries hardcoded line breaks (
in the heading; explicit
tags in the desktop paragraph, which is also whitespace-nowrap), so a brand font or longer copy can break the intended line composition or overflow the nowrap center column. The two images are hard-locked to aspect-[438/346] and aspect-[900/600]/[3/2], so off-ratio brand art will be cropped by object-cover. The desktop layout assumes a fixed grid-cols-[26%_1fr_48%] split sized to the current asset ratios.
